title: cynanchum pedunculatum
intro: Cynanchum pedunculatum, also known as Chinese foxglove or She Gan, is a plant species in the Apocynaceae family, commonly used in traditional Chinese medicine. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, anti-oxidant, and anti-viral properties. Cynanchum pedunculatum has been used to treat various health conditions, such as fever, cough, and respiratory problems, and is also believed to have cardiovascular benefits, including lowering blood pressure and improving blood flow. The plant is often prepared as a decoction, capsule, or tincture, and is also used in combination with other herbs in traditional Chinese medicine.
